description_long: This object appears to be a heavily rusted and partially decayed shotgun, with significant corrosion and material loss along its length. The barrel is largely intact but shows extensive surface pitting and flaking, with jagged edges and missing sections, especially near the muzzle. The receiver and stock area are also degraded, with the stock either missing or reduced to a fragmented, splintered remnant. The coloration is dominated by reddish-brown rust tones, with some lighter patches where the metal has worn away or oxidized further. The overall form is still recognizable as a shotgun, but the severe weathering and damage suggest it has been abandoned or exposed to the elements for a long period. No visible markings, engravings, or intact mechanical components are discernible due to the advanced state of decay.
description: A severely rusted, decayed shotgun with extensive corrosion, jagged edges, and missing stock, dominated by reddish-brown tones.
description_view_0: The left side view highlights the corroded barrel and the jagged, fragmented end of the shotgun, with the stock area almost entirely missing.
description_view_1: The top-down view reveals the hollowed-out receiver and barrel, showing the extent of internal decay and the uneven, pitted surface.
description_view_2: The rear oblique view emphasizes the splintered remains of the stock and the rough, rusted texture along the length of the shotgun.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the shotgun's open receiver and the severely damaged, irregular stock area, with more visible internal corrosion.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, with visible corrosion and no clear ribbing or venting
attribute_action_mechanism: not visually identifiable due to corrosion and missing parts
attribute_trigger_guard_design: not clearly visible; appears absent or completely degraded
